# goautoneg

Package goautoneg is copied from
[github.com/munnerz/goautoneg](https://github.com/munnerz/goautoneg) to avoid
taking an external dependency for a small, self-contained package. The upstream
project implements HTTP content-type autonegotiation as specified in
[RFC 2616 §14](https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec14.html).
